item.title: Ansible
item.description: ansible-navigator The Cheatcode Getting Ready Using Libvirt and Ansible to Automate KVM Virtual Machine Deployments How to Install Ansible Using uv Ad Hoc Ansible Commands Ansible Documentation Ansible Inventory and Ansible.cfg Ansible Playbooks Ansible Roles Ansible Vault Ansible.cfg Boot Process Deploying files Encrypted passwords Execution Environments Handlers Host Name Patterns Including and importing Files Jinja2 templates Manage Users and Groups with Ansible Managing Packages, Repositories, and Subscriptions with Ansible Managing Partitions and LVM Managing Services with Ansible Networking with Ansible NFS Setup Optimizing Ansible Processing SeLinux File Properties SSH Connections Using Ansible Tags Using Loops and Items Using Modules for Troubleshooting and Testing Using Variables In Ansible Using when to Run Tasks Conditionally

item.title: Networking
item.description: How I Studied for the CCNA Exam How I passed the CCNA exam first try. Consoling in to MX80 from linux How to console into an MX80 router from linux DNS DNS Stuff How to Study for the CCNA Exam Guide to how you should approach studying for the CCNA exam Juniper CLI Basics Juniper Basics My CCNA Notes Notes I took for a multitude of CCNA resources Networking Devices and Connections Hostname, IP addressing, network protocols, network manager, tools, etc. Networking Network Devices and Network Connections Hostname, IP addressing, network protocols, network manager, tools, etc. Resources for Passing CCNA Resources for passing the CCNA exam Time Synchronization NTP, Chrony, etc. Toggle PoE on a Juniper Switch How to toggle PoE on a Juniper switch. What to Learn After CCNA What you should learn after taking the CCNA exam

item.title: System
item.description: You Need to Learn Man Pages You need to be using man pages. Here is how. A short guide to using Man Pages Advanced File Management File permissions, ACLs, and finding things Advanced Package Management Managing package groups, application streams, modules, and DNF Advanced User Management Password aging, group and user manament AutoFS Managing AutoFS Basic File Managment File types, linking, viewing, and archiving files. Basic Package Management RPM and package integrity and credibility Basic User Management Manage users and groups Boot Process, Grub2, and Kernel Linux kernel, boot process, and password recovery Installing RHEL Linux Installation Logs and Cockpit Interaction Basic Commands and Directory Structure Local File Systems and Swap Local file systems and swap Network File System (NFS) Managing NFS and AutoFS Partitioning, MBR, and GPT Partitions and their management. Process and Task Scheduling Processes, priorities, and scheduling jobs. Remove a filesystem from a partition Remove a filesystem from a partition. RHCSA Exam Environment Guide Exam environment guide for RHCSA RHCSA Vagrant Lab Setup Lab setup for RHCSA using Vagrant System Initialization, Message Logging, and System Tuning System initialization, service management, tuning, and logging The Secure Shell Service OpenSSH, system access, file transfer Thin Provisioning and LVM Thin provisioning and LVM Time Synchronization NTP, Chrony, etc. Virtual Data Optimizer (VDO) VDO

item.title: Tools
item.description: How to Remove Formatting From Ebook Highlights With Vim Removing extra stuff from Bookfusion and Foliate exported highlights Calibre Web with Docker and NGINX Setting up your own Calibre Web server using Docker and NGINX Proxmox PfSense HaProxy Setup Access Proxmox PVE GUI through HaProxy on PfSense Why I Stopped Using AI so Much Some benefits of not using AI Calibre Web with Docker and NGINX Setting up your own Calibre Web server using Docker and NGINX Configure Fedora Desktop using Ansible New Fedora Build Using Ansible How to Build a website With Hugo Guide for setting up a static website with Hugo How to Build a website With Hugo Guide for setting up a static website with Hugo How to Process Bookfusion Highlights with Vim Removing extra stuff from Bookfusion exported highlights How to Set Up Hugo Relearn Theme Hugo Relearn setup guide How to Set Up Hugo Relearn Theme Hugo Relearn setup guide Nextcloud on RHEL Based Systems Nextcloud setup guide on a RHEL based server Nextcloud on RHEL Based Systems Nextcloud setup guide on a RHEL based server Self hosting a Nextcloud Server Self hosting a Nextcloud server Self hosting a Nextcloud Server Self hosting a Nextcloud server Using Vagrant on Linux How to use Vagrant from a Linux computer. Using Vagrant on Linux How to use Vagrant from a Linux computer. Vim Guide Guide to using Vim Vim Guide Guide to using Vim You Need to Learn Man Pages Guide to using Man Pages
